schema.purpose: BPHS Chapters 3-7, 26-27 aspect, dignity, and strength rules. Actionable rule schema with detection keys for planetary aspects (full/special), dignities (uccha/swakshetra/debilitated/moolatrikona), and strength indicators (shadbala, vimshopaka). Covers benefic/malefic aspect effects, positional dignity, and combinatorial strength outcomes.
schema.approximate_verses: shloka-level references are placeholders pending Pandit verification
schema.note: Each rule is keyed by `core_key`, matched against the app's computed aspect/dignity/strength data via coreEvidence(). `cancellation` lists classical exceptions (bhanga) or weakening conditions. Weight reflects potency: aspect effects (1-3), dignity effects (2-4), combined strength (3-5).
schema.polarity: positive = benefic aspect/dignity/strength, negative = malefic aspect/debilitation/weakness, mixed = conditional

conditions.desc: Sun aspects Jupiter fully (7th house aspect).

cancellation: Sun debilitated or combust weakens the aspect
Jupiter in 6/8/12 from Sun reduces benefic effect

translations.en: Sun's full aspect on Jupiter: enhances status, career growth, authority and leadership qualities.
translations.hi: सूर्य की पूर्ण दृष्टि गुरु पर: स्थिति, करियर वृद्धि, प्राधिकार और नेतृत्व गुणों को बढ़ाती है।

conditions.desc: Jupiter aspects Sun fully (5th, 7th, 9th house aspects).

cancellation: Jupiter debilitated or combust weakens the aspect
Sun in 6/8/12 from Jupiter reduces wisdom flow

translations.en: Jupiter's full aspect on Sun: bestows wisdom, spiritual growth, good fortune and enhanced status.
translations.hi: गुरु की पूर्ण दृष्टि सूर्य पर: ज्ञान, आध्यात्मिक विकास, भाग्य और उन्नत स्थिति प्रदान करती है।

conditions.desc: Mars aspects Saturn fully (4th, 7th, 8th house aspects).

cancellation: If both in mutual dignity or exalted, conflict transforms to structured achievement
Benefic aspect on either planet mitigates harshness

translations.en: Mars' full aspect on Saturn: creates conflict, obstacles, career challenges but also discipline.
translations.hi: मंगल की पूर्ण दृष्टि शनि पर: संघर्ष, बाधाएँ, करियर चुनौतियाँ लेकिन अनुशासन भी लाती है।

conditions.desc: Saturn aspects Mars fully (3rd, 7th, 10th house aspects).

cancellation: Mars exalted or in own sign reduces frustration
Saturn in dignity transforms delay to steady progress

translations.en: Saturn's full aspect on Mars: causes delays, frustration in career but builds endurance and patience.
translations.hi: शनि की पूर्ण दृष्टि मंगल पर: देरी, करियर में निराशा लेकिन धीरज और सहनशीलता बनाती है।

conditions.desc: Venus aspects Jupiter fully.

cancellation: Venus combust or afflicted reduces luxury
Jupiter debilitated weakens fortune aspect

translations.en: Venus' full aspect on Jupiter: brings wealth, luxury, marital happiness and good fortune.
translations.hi: शुक्र की पूर्ण दृष्टि गुरु पर: धन, विलासिता, वैवाहिक सुख और भाग्य लाती है।

conditions.desc: Mercury casts special aspect (no special aspect, only full 7th).

cancellation: Mercury combust nullifies communication benefits
Afflicted Mercury causes miscommunication

translations.en: Mercury's aspect: enhances communication, business acumen and intellectual abilities when strong.
translations.hi: बुध की दृष्टि: संचार, व्यापारिक कौशल और बौद्धिक क्षमताओं को बढ़ाती है जब मजबूत हो।

conditions.desc: Sun in exalted sign (Aries).

cancellation: Sun in enemy sign or debilitated in navamsa reduces exaltation benefits
Combustion near exaltation still powerful but tempered

translations.en: Sun exalted in Aries: maximum authority, leadership, government connections, high status and career success.
translations.hi: सूर्य मेष राशि में उच्च: अधिकतम प्राधिकार, नेतृत्व, सरकारी संबंध, उच्च स्थिति और करियर सफलता।

conditions.desc: Moon in debilitated sign (Scorpio).

cancellation: Strong benefic aspects on Moon
Moon in own navamsa or vargottama
Neechabhanga yoga present

translations.en: Moon debilitated in Scorpio: emotional instability, mental stress, mother-related issues, lack of stability.
translations.hi: चंद्र वृश्चिक राशि में नीच: भावनात्मक अस्थिरता, मानसिक तनाव, माता संबंधी समस्याएँ, स्थिरता की कमी।

conditions.desc: Mars in own sign (Aries or Scorpio).

cancellation: Mars in 6/8/12 houses reduces strength
Afflicted by Saturn/Rahu weakens courage

translations.en: Mars in own sign: enhanced courage, abundant energy, career advancement, leadership abilities, sports excellence.
translations.hi: मंगल स्वयं राशि में: बढ़ा हुआ साहस, प्रचुर ऊर्जा, करियर प्रगति, नेतृत्व क्षमता, खेल उत्कृष्टता।

conditions.desc: Jupiter in moolatrikona sign (Cancer).

cancellation: Jupiter in dusthana houses reduces benefits
Combust Jupiter weakens wisdom transmission

translations.en: Jupiter in moolatrikona Cancer: strong wisdom, teaching abilities, spiritual growth, good fortune, children benefits.
translations.hi: गुरु कर्क राशि में मूलत्रिकोण: मजबूत ज्ञान, शिक्षण क्षमता, आध्यात्मिक विकास, भाग्य, संतान लाभ।

conditions.desc: Venus in debilitated sign (Virgo).

cancellation: Venus in own navamsa or vargottama
Strong benefic aspects
Neechabhanga yoga present

translations.en: Venus debilitated in Virgo: lack of luxury, comfort issues, marital problems, wealth obstacles, artistic blocks.
translations.hi: शुक्र कन्या राशि में नीच: विलास की कमी, आराम समस्याएँ, वैवाहिक समस्याएँ, धन बाधाएँ, कलात्मक बाधाएँ।

conditions.desc: Saturn in exalted sign (Libra).

cancellation: Saturn in 6/8/12 reduces exaltation benefits
Afflicted by Mars/Sun weakens authority

translations.en: Saturn exalted in Libra: maximum discipline, career stability, authority through justice, endurance, fair judgment.
translations.hi: शनि तुला राशि में उच्च: अधिकतम अनुशासन, करियर स्थिरता, न्याय से प्राधिकार, धीरज, निष्पक्ष निर्णय।

conditions.desc: Sun achieves high shadbala (above average strength).

cancellation: Sun weak in dignity despite shadbala
Shadbala calculated incorrectly

translations.en: Sun with high shadbala: strong status, authority, career prospects, vitality, self-confidence.
translations.hi: उच्च षड्बल वाला सूर्य: मजबूत स्थिति, प्राधिकार, करियर संभावनाएँ, जीवन शक्ति, आत्मविश्वास।

conditions.desc: Moon has low shadbala (below average strength).

cancellation: Moon in strong dignity compensates for low shadbala
Strong benefic aspects on Moon

translations.en: Moon with low shadbala: emotional weakness, mental instability, lack of stability, mother-related issues, health concerns.
translations.hi: कम षड्बल वाला चंद्र: भावनात्मक कमजोरी, मानसिक अस्थिरता, स्थिरता की कमी, माता संबंधी समस्याएँ, स्वास्थ्य चिंताएँ।

conditions.desc: Jupiter achieves excellent vimshopaka (20 points).

cancellation: Jupiter weak in dignity despite vimshopaka
Vimshopaka calculation errors

translations.en: Jupiter with excellent vimshopaka: supreme wisdom, spiritual attainment, great fortune, teaching excellence, guidance abilities.
translations.hi: उत्कृष्ट विंशोपक वाला गुरु: सर्वोच्च ज्ञान, आध्यात्मिक प्राप्ति, महान भाग्य, शिक्षण उत्कृष्टता, मार्गदर्शन क्षमता।

conditions.desc: Saturn has poor vimshopaka (below 10 points).

cancellation: Saturn in strong dignity compensates for poor vimshopaka
Saturn in kendras gives positional strength

translations.en: Saturn with poor vimshopaka: weak discipline, career struggles, poor endurance, injustice issues, irresponsibility.
translations.hi: कमजोर विंशोपक वाला शनि: कमजोर अनुशासन, करियर संघर्ष, खराब धीरज, अन्याय समस्याएँ, अजिम्मेदारी।

conditions.desc: Sun and Moon in mutual aspect (opposition or trine).

cancellation: If either planet debilitated, imbalance occurs
Combustion of either planet weakens the aspect

translations.en: Mutual aspect Sun-Moon: creates balance between status and emotions, authority and mind, but can cause internal conflict.
translations.hi: सूर्य-चंद्र परस्पर दृष्टि: स्थिति और भावनाओं, प्राधिकार और मन के बीच संतुलन बनाती है, लेकिन आंतरिक संघर्ष हो सकता है।

conditions.desc: Rahu aspects Sun (5th, 7th, 9th from its position).

cancellation: Sun in strong dignity resists Rahu's influence
Jupiter's aspect on Sun mitigates Rahu effect

translations.en: Rahu's aspect on Sun: creates conflict with authority, career obstacles, excessive ambition, ego issues.
translations.hi: राहु की दृष्टि सूर्य पर: प्राधिकार के साथ संघर्ष, करियर बाधाएँ, अत्यधिक महत्वाकांक्षा, अहंकार समस्याएँ।

conditions.desc: Ketu aspects Jupiter (5th, 7th, 9th from its position).

cancellation: Jupiter in strong dignity maintains wisdom despite Ketu
Ketu's spiritual nature can enhance Jupiter's spiritual side

translations.en: Ketu's aspect on Jupiter: brings spiritual detachment, unconventional wisdom, fortune through spirituality, possible material loss.
translations.hi: केतु की दृष्टि गुरु पर: आध्यात्मिक वैराग्य, अपरंपरागत ज्ञान, आध्यात्मिकता से भाग्य, संभावित भौतिक हानि।

conditions.desc: Planet has both good dignity (own/exalted/moolatrikona) and high shadbala.

cancellation: Planet in dusthana houses despite dignity/strength
Severe afflictions from malefics

translations.en: Combined dignity and strength: maximum planetary effectiveness, career success, high status, overall achievement.
translations.hi: संयुक्त गौरव और शक्ति: अधिकतम ग्रह प्रभावशीलता, करियर सफलता, उच्च स्थिति, समग्र उपलब्धि।
